data.content: Plan needs revision before implementation. Verified root cause is plausible: shared SelectContent still defaults to position="item-aligned" in src/components/ui/select.tsx, and Queues View multi-select/filter controls instantiate these selects in src/components/filter-bar.tsx. RepoSwitcher uses DropdownMenu, so it should remain part of verification scope but is likely not the root cause. Blocking issue: proposed automated coverage is only a source contract asserting the default value, which does not meet acceptance criterion 5 requiring Playwright or equivalent browser assertions for stable scroll position and nearby element boxes across every pulldown in this view. Once the plan explicitly adds that browser-level check, the implementation approach looks feasible.
